parents.subject: LU-11915 tests: stop running conf-sanity test 110

commit.subject: LU-7897 utils: an infrastructure to benchmark and test OSD
commit.message:
LU-7897 utils: an infrastructure to benchmark and test OSD

using requests in OUT format. with this infrastructure it's
possible to develop synthetic benchmarks to learn performance
of specific OSD updates and combinations. also, it's possible
to build funcional tests to automatically verify correctness
of OSD API and implementations (ldiskfs-osd, zfs-osd, osp,,,)

TODO:
 - common user/kernel-space library to pack/unpack OUT
 - non-modifying access: read, lookup, etc
 - index iterations
 - zero-copy read/write
 - run with OSP

Test-Parameters: fortestonly

Change-Id: Ic595ebc56cc32654c58a9922570e3296183390a4
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
